prompt:
## Intent

Theme test for indicator

## Desired Outcome

Implement and verify theme-sensitive styling for the status indicator component.

## Repo Context

- Intent Driven Development POC workspace
- Theme-sensitive UI component development
- Start in Surface Library: src/demo-app/render/render-surface-frame.ts and src/demo-app/render/render-surface-page.ts.
- If the owner is adjacent, check src/demo-app/model/catalog.ts and src/demo-app/model/types.ts next.
- UI State Metadata: Source planning metadata is the reusable UI-state contract; prefer planning.verificationNotes and planning.uiStates over prompt-specific routing rules.
- Open routing question: Prompt normalization identified Surface Library as the most likely code surface within intent-poc-app.

## Source Scope

- intent-poc-app
- Selected source: intent-poc-app.
- Likely owning surface: Surface Library (medium confidence).
- Fallback surfaces to inspect next: Intent Studio.

## Adaptive Boundaries

- Must support light and dark theme modes
- Must use shared dark query parameter for verification
- Keep this draft inside intent-poc-app until the owning surface is confirmed.
- Start with Surface Library before widening into adjacent surfaces.
- Resolve whether the change belongs to Intent Studio before touching multiple UI surfaces.

## Minimum Success

- Status indicator renders correctly in both light and dark modes
- Visual evidence captured for both theme states
- Implement and verify theme-sensitive styling for the status indicator component.
- The draft keeps the change centered on Surface Library instead of the whole repo.
- The final plan names one existing UI verification path instead of inventing a new workflow.

## Baseline

- Existing status indicator implementation in surface-library
- Capture the current baseline in Surface Library before changing behavior.

## Verification Obligations

- Verify theme state via query-param before screenshot capture
- Provide paired light-mode and dark-mode screenshot evidence
- Name the existing Playwright or screenshot check that will prove the behavior change.

## Raw Intent

Theme test for indicator
